key_findings: S5 branch generators s1,s2,s3,s4 share primitive operator word L Q but encode different transpositions.
Therefore primitive operator word alone is not state-complete for arbitrary branch presentations.
The generator/action registry must be treated as retained carrier data, not metadata.
This strengthens the cross-corpus scalar/projection-loss rule: terminal readouts are not carried state unless next-transition-complete.
B^21 resolution floor q=(17711,28657), uv=507544127, half_width=6.18979215099812e-09 was revalidated.
